title: NGN/NTN–PPDR Simulator
subtitle: Digital Twin & Scenario Evaluation
description: Digital-twin and scenario-evaluation platform for resilient communications across terrestrial and non-terrestrial networks.

sections.title: Technical Note
sections.content: The NGN/NTN–PPDR simulator supports research and testing of next-generation network architectures for public protection and disaster relief. It enables protocol validation, capacity planning, and training in PPDR communications across terrestrial and non-terrestrial (satellite, aerial) scenarios. Digital-twin capabilities support operator-facing KPI workflows, mock interfaces for telecom-space and PPDR workflows, and future policy-evaluation extensions. The platform targets resilient emergency communications and international collaboration.
